info.name: School Management API
info.description:
API collection for School Management System
- Add new schools
- List schools sorted by proximity

request.description: Check if the API server is running

Add a new school to the database

**Request Body:**
- name: School name (required, non-empty string)
- address: School address (required, non-empty string)
- latitude: Latitude coordinate (required, -90 to 90)
- longitude: Longitude coordinate (required, -180 to 180)

**Success Response:** 201 Created

response.name: Success - School Added
Error - Validation Failed

request.description:
Fetch all schools sorted by proximity to user's location

**Query Parameters:**
- latitude: User's latitude (required, -90 to 90)
- longitude: User's longitude (required, -180 to 180)

**Distance Sorting:** Schools sorted from closest to farthest (ascending order)

**Success Response:** 200 OK

response.name: Success - Schools Listed
Error - Missing Parameters

request.description: Test with different user coordinates to see schools sorted by different distances

variable.description: Change this to your deployed API URL when in production
